title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following improvements that could be made to the education system, then decide which two would have the greatest positive impact.
options: Greater use of technology in lessons

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some improvements that could be made to the education system.
Now decide which two improvements would have the greatest positive impact on students.
